zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin於1314年12月18日出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 盧皮林多福時，她的父親Ulrich II Count von Lindau33歲，母親Agnes von Anhalt12歲。她於大約1311年與Wizlaw III Fürst von Rügen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1343年5月9日在德國海因里希_普洛文斯 本 薩可尼藍德可萊斯 維騰格享年28歲，埋葬在烏克蘭維騰格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin于1314年12月18日出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 盧皮林多福时，她的父亲Ulrich II Count von Lindau33岁，母亲Agnes von Anhalt12岁。她于大约1311年与Wizlaw III Fürst von Rügen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1343年5月9日在德国海因里希_普洛文斯 本 薩可尼藍德可萊斯 維騰格享年28岁，埋葬在乌克兰維騰格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin was born on 18 December 1314, in Lindow, Ruppin, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany, her father, Ulrich II Count von Lindau, was 33 and her mother, Agnes von Anhalt, was 12. She married Wizlaw III Fürst von Rügen about 1311. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 9 May 1343, in Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 28, and was buried in Wittenberg, Ukraine.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin est née le 18 décembre 1314, à Lindow, Kreis Ruppin, Provinz Brandenburg, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Ulrich II Count von Lindau, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Anhalt, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Wizlaw III Fürst von Rügen environ 1311. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1343, à Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Wittenberg, Ukraine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin am 18. Dezember 1314 in Lindow, Kreis Ruppin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ulrich II Count von Lindau 33 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Anhalt 12. Sie hat um 1311 Wizlaw III Fürst von Rügen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1343 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Deutschland und wurde in Wittenberg, Ukraine begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin è nata il il 18 dicembre 1314 nel Lindow, Kreis Ruppin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Ulrich II Count von Lindau, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Anhalt, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Wizlaw III Fürst von Rügen circa 1311. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 maggio 1343, nel Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Wittenberg, Ucraina.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin(이)가 1314년 12월 18일 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 브랜덴버그 크레이스 루핀 린도에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ulrich II Count von Lindau(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Anhalt(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 대략 1311년 Wizlaw III Fürst von Rügen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1343년 5월 9일 독일 플레우ss 플로빈스 프 사스니 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 우크라이나 윗텐버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin nasceu em 18 de dezembro de 1314, em Lindow, Kreis Ruppin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Ulrich II Count von Lindau, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Anhalt, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Wizlaw III Fürst von Rügen aproximadamente 1311. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1343, em Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Alemanha, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Wittenberg, Ucrânia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin родилась 18 декабря 1314 г. в местности линдоу, крис руппин, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Ulrich II Count von Lindau было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Anhalt, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wizlaw III Fürst von Rügen около 1311 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 мая 1343 г. в местности ландкрис виттенбирг, провинц оф саксони, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности виттенбирг, Украина.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes von Lindow-Ruppin nació el 18 de diciembre de 1314, en Lindow, Kreis Ruppin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Ulrich II Count von Lindau, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnes von Anhalt, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Wizlaw III Fürst von Rügen aproximadamente 1311. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1343, en Landkreis Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultada en Wittenberg, Ucrania.
